DeviceInfo.DeviceName: C1UL-2_PVC_HVSM座椅2路加热2路通风模块

Part.Name: I-倍速链顶升气缸伸出位
I-倍速链顶升气缸缩回位
工位1静态电流测试启动
工位2静态电流测试启动
工位3静态电流测试启动
工位4静态电流测试启动

工位2-交流接触器给模块上电-供大电流
工位3-交流接触器给模块上电-供大电流
工位4-交流接触器给模块上电-供大电流

StatusUnit.Name: IDLE

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 倍速链通信交互.Field.ReadySignal=1;
StatusUnit.Name: PreStart
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链通信交互.Field.ReadySignal=1;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 检测程序.Method.Sleep(55);
StatusUnit.Name: 启动按钮按下
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 检测程序.Method.Sleep(55);

StatusUnit.Name: 开始
读取二维码
接插件气缸复位

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4304000176.Part.Q-倍速链顶升气缸=0;
StatusUnit.Name: 顶升气缸复位
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4304000176.Part.Q-倍速链顶升气缸=0;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4304000176.Part.Q-快换气缸=1;
StatusUnit.Name: 快换气缸复位
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4304000176.Part.Q-快换气缸=1;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4304000176.Part.Q-倍速链顶升气缸=1;
StatusUnit.Name: 气缸顶升
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4304000176.Part.Q-倍速链顶升气缸=1;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: IN4304000176.Part.Q-快换气缸=1;
StatusUnit.Name: 载盘夹紧
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: IN4304000176.Part.Q-快换气缸=1;

StatusUnit.Name: 探针插入

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 检测程序.Method.Sleep(200);
StatusUnit.Name: 判断是否需要复位
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 检测程序.Method.Sleep(200);

StatusUnit.Name: 通信启动

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 倍速链通信交互.Field.ReadySignal=0; 倍速链通信交互.Field.CompleteSignal=1;
StatusUnit.Name: 通信赋值
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链通信交互.Field.ReadySignal=0; 倍速链通信交互.Field.CompleteSignal=1;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct1CompleteState=1;
StatusUnit.Name: 工位1OK
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct1CompleteState=1;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct1CompleteState=0;
StatusUnit.Name: 工位1NG
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct1CompleteState=0;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct2CompleteState=1;
StatusUnit.Name: 工位2OK
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct2CompleteState=1;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct3CompleteState=1;
StatusUnit.Name: 工位3OK
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct3CompleteState=1;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct4CompleteState=1;
StatusUnit.Name: 工位4OK
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct4CompleteState=1;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct2CompleteState=0;
StatusUnit.Name: 工位2NG
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct2CompleteState=0;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct3CompleteState=0;
StatusUnit.Name: 工位3NG
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct3CompleteState=0;

StatusUnit.EnterNote: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct4CompleteState=0;
StatusUnit.Name: 工位4NG
StatusUnit.EnterFunction: 倍速链通信交互.Field.LoadPlateProduct4CompleteState=0;

Condition.Name: 上电唤醒_DriverBackSignal信号检测悬空
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074001.Para.信耀内部APP版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.信耀内部Boot版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.信耀内部CAL版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.模块总成号==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.供应商零件号==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.生产序列号==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.验证工作电流==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.VBAT1_12V采样==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.VBAT2_12V采样==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074001.Para.信耀内部APP版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.信耀内部Boot版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.信耀内部CAL版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.模块总成号==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.供应商零件号==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.生产序列号==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.验证工作电流==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.VBAT1_12V采样==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.VBAT2_12V采样==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: DriverBackSignal信号检测悬空_DriverBackSignal信号检测外接10K电阻
DriverBackSignal信号检测外接10K电阻_CoDriverBackSignal信号检测悬空
CoDriverBackSignal信号检测悬空_CoDriverBackSignal信号检测外接10K电阻
CoDriverBackSignal信号检测外接10K电阻_DriverCushionSignal信号检测悬空
DriverCushionSignal信号检测悬空_DriverCushionSignal信号检测外接10K电阻
DriverCushionSignal信号检测外接10K电阻_CoDriverCushionSignal信号检测悬空
CoDriverCushionSignal信号检测悬空_CoDriverCushionSignal信号检测外接10K电阻
CoDriverCushionSignal信号检测外接10K电阻_FanOutput信号检测
FanOutput信号检测_DiscreteInput信号检测悬空
DiscreteInput信号检测悬空_DiscreteInput信号检测接GND
DiscreteInput信号检测接GND_小电流电路检测左边
小电流电路检测左边_小电流电路检测右边
小电流电路检测右边_DriverBack检测
DriverCushion检测_CoDriverCushion检测
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074001.Para.DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074001.Para.DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: CoDriverCushion检测_启动休眠电流检测
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074001.Para.Co-DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.Co-DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074001.Para.Co-DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.Co-DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: 启动休眠电流检测_静态电流检测结束
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位1静态电流测试启动==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位1静态电流测试启动==0&&

Condition.Name: 静态电流检测结束_CHECKEND
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074001.Para.故障码读取==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.休眠功能-静态电流==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074001.Para.故障码读取==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.休眠功能-静态电流==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: 开始检测_不判断二维码
刷新APP_上电唤醒
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074001.Para.刷新CAL1结果==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.刷新CAL2结果==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074001.Para.刷新CAL1结果==TRUE&& PR4101001074001.Para.刷新CAL2结果==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: PRESTART_休眠电流
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位1静态电流测试启动==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位1静态电流测试启动==1&&

Condition.Name: 电流未降低_PRESTART
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位1静态电流测试启动=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位1静态电流测试启动=0;

Condition.Name: 电流降低_PRESTART
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位1静态电流测试启动=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位1静态电流测试启动=0;

Condition.Name: 上电唤醒_DriverBackSignal信号检测悬空
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074002.Para.信耀内部APP版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.信耀内部Boot版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.信耀内部CAL版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.模块总成号==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.供应商零件号==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.生产序列号==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.验证工作电流==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.VBAT1_12V采样==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.VBAT2_12V采样==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074002.Para.信耀内部APP版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.信耀内部Boot版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.信耀内部CAL版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.模块总成号==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.供应商零件号==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.生产序列号==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.验证工作电流==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.VBAT1_12V采样==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.VBAT2_12V采样==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: DriverBackSignal信号检测悬空_DriverBackSignal信号检测外接10K电阻
DriverBackSignal信号检测外接10K电阻_CoDriverBackSignal信号检测悬空

Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074002.Para.DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074002.Para.DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: CoDriverCushion检测_启动休眠电流检测
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074002.Para.Co-DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.Co-DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074002.Para.Co-DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.Co-DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: 启动休眠电流检测_静态电流检测结束
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位2静态电流测试启动==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位2静态电流测试启动==0&&

Condition.Name: 静态电流检测结束_CHECKEND
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074002.Para.故障码读取==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.休眠功能-静态电流==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074002.Para.故障码读取==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.休眠功能-静态电流==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: 开始检测_不判断二维码
刷新APP_上电唤醒
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074002.Para.刷新CAL1结果==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.刷新CAL2结果==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074002.Para.刷新CAL1结果==TRUE&& PR4101001074002.Para.刷新CAL2结果==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: PRESTART_休眠电流
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位2静态电流测试启动==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位2静态电流测试启动==1&&

Condition.Name: 电流未降低_PRESTART
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位2静态电流测试启动=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位2静态电流测试启动=0;

Condition.Name: 电流降低_PRESTART
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位2静态电流测试启动=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位2静态电流测试启动=0;

Condition.Name: 上电唤醒_DriverBackSignal信号检测悬空
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074003.Para.信耀内部APP版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.信耀内部Boot版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.信耀内部CAL版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.模块总成号==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.供应商零件号==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.生产序列号==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.验证工作电流==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.VBAT1_12V采样==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.VBAT2_12V采样==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074003.Para.信耀内部APP版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.信耀内部Boot版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.信耀内部CAL版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.模块总成号==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.供应商零件号==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.生产序列号==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.验证工作电流==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.VBAT1_12V采样==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.VBAT2_12V采样==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: DriverBackSignal信号检测悬空_DriverBackSignal信号检测外接10K电阻
DriverBackSignal信号检测外接10K电阻_CoDriverBackSignal信号检测悬空
CoDriverBackSignal信号检测悬空_CoDriverBackSignal信号检测外接10K电阻
CoDriverBackSignal信号检测外接10K电阻_DriverCushionSignal信号检测悬空
DriverCushionSignal信号检测悬空_DriverCushionSignal信号检测外接10K电阻
DriverCushionSignal信号检测外接10K电阻_CoDriverCushionSignal信号检测悬空
CoDriverCushionSignal信号检测悬空_CoDriverCushionSignal信号检测外接10K电阻
CoDriverCushionSignal信号检测外接10K电阻_FanOutput信号检测
FanOutput信号检测_DiscreteInput信号检测悬空
DiscreteInput信号检测悬空_DiscreteInput信号检测接GND
DiscreteInput信号检测接GND_小电流电路检测左边
小电流电路检测左边_小电流电路检测右边
小电流电路检测右边_DriverBack检测
DriverCushion检测_CoDriverCushion检测
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074003.Para.DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074003.Para.DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: CoDriverCushion检测_启动休眠电流检测
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074003.Para.Co-DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.Co-DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074003.Para.Co-DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.Co-DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: 启动休眠电流检测_静态电流检测结束
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位3静态电流测试启动==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位3静态电流测试启动==0&&

Condition.Name: 静态电流检测结束_CHECKEND
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074003.Para.故障码读取==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.休眠功能-静态电流==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074003.Para.故障码读取==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.休眠功能-静态电流==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: 开始检测_不判断二维码
刷新APP_上电唤醒
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074003.Para.刷新CAL1结果==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.刷新CAL2结果==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074003.Para.刷新CAL1结果==TRUE&& PR4101001074003.Para.刷新CAL2结果==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: PRESTART_休眠电流
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位3静态电流测试启动==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位3静态电流测试启动==1&&

Condition.Name: 电流未降低_PRESTART
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位3静态电流测试启动=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位3静态电流测试启动=0;

Condition.Name: 电流降低_PRESTART
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位3静态电流测试启动=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位3静态电流测试启动=0;

Condition.Name: 上电唤醒_DriverBackSignal信号检测悬空
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074004.Para.信耀内部APP版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.信耀内部Boot版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.信耀内部CAL版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.模块总成号==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.供应商零件号==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.生产序列号==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.验证工作电流==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.VBAT1_12V采样==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.VBAT2_12V采样==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074004.Para.信耀内部APP版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.信耀内部Boot版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.信耀内部CAL版本号==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.模块总成号==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.供应商零件号==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.生产序列号==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.验证工作电流==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.VBAT1_12V采样==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.VBAT2_12V采样==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: DriverBackSignal信号检测悬空_DriverBackSignal信号检测外接10K电阻
DriverBackSignal信号检测外接10K电阻_CoDriverBackSignal信号检测悬空

DriverCushion检测_CoDriverCushion检测
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074004.Para.DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074004.Para.DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: CoDriverCushion检测_启动休眠电流检测
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074004.Para.Co-DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.Co-DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074004.Para.Co-DriverCushion电流检测==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.Co-DriverCushionPWM检测-检测输出电压==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: 启动休眠电流检测_静态电流检测结束
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位4静态电流测试启动==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位4静态电流测试启动==0&&

Condition.Name: 静态电流检测结束_CHECKEND
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074004.Para.故障码读取==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.休眠功能-静态电流==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074004.Para.故障码读取==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.休眠功能-静态电流==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: 开始检测_不判断二维码
刷新APP_上电唤醒
Condition.ConditionFunction: PR4101001074004.Para.刷新CAL1结果==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.刷新CAL2结果==TRUE&&
Condition.ConditionNote: PR4101001074004.Para.刷新CAL1结果==TRUE&& PR4101001074004.Para.刷新CAL2结果==TRUE&&

Condition.Name: PRESTART_休眠电流
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位4静态电流测试启动==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位4静态电流测试启动==1&&

Condition.Name: 电流未降低_PRESTART
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位4静态电流测试启动=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位4静态电流测试启动=0;

Condition.Name: 电流降低_PRESTART
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4304000176.Part.工位4静态电流测试启动=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4304000176.Part.工位4静态电流测试启动=0;

Condition.Name: PreStart_等待启动按钮
Condition.ExitFunction: IN4304000176.Part.是否是通信启动=0; 倍速链通信交互.Field.ReadySignal=0;
Condition.ExitNote: IN4304000176.Part.是否是通信启动=0; 倍速链通信交互.Field.ReadySignal=0;

Condition.Name: 等待启动按钮_启动按钮按下
接插件气缸复位_快换气缸复位
Condition.ExitFunction: 检测程序.Method.Sleep(2500);
Condition.ExitNote: 检测程序.Method.Sleep(2500);

Condition.Name: 快换气缸复位_顶升气缸复位
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.I-快换气缸伸出位==1&& IN4304000176.Part.I-快换气缸缩回位==0&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.I-快换气缸伸出位==1&& IN4304000176.Part.I-快换气缸缩回位==0&&

Condition.Name: 启动按钮按下_气缸顶升
气缸顶升_载盘夹紧
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.I-倍速链顶升气缸缩回位==0&& IN4304000176.Part.I-倍速链顶升气缸伸出位==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.I-倍速链顶升气缸缩回位==0&& IN4304000176.Part.I-倍速链顶升气缸伸出位==1&&
Condition.ExitFunction: 检测程序.Method.Sleep(2000);
Condition.ExitNote: 检测程序.Method.Sleep(2000);

Condition.Name: 载盘夹紧_探针插入
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.I-快换气缸缩回位==0&& IN4304000176.Part.I-快换气缸伸出位==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.I-快换气缸缩回位==0&& IN4304000176.Part.I-快换气缸伸出位==1&&

Condition.Name: 探针插入_开始
Condition.ExitFunction: 检测程序.Method.Sleep(3500);
Condition.ExitNote: 检测程序.Method.Sleep(3500);

Condition.Name: 准备复位_接插件气缸复位
IDLE_判断是否需要复位
Condition.ExitFunction: 检测程序.Field.IsRun=1;
Condition.ExitNote: 检测程序.Field.IsRun=1;

Condition.Name: 判断是否需要复位_准备复位
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.I-倍速链顶升气缸缩回位!=1|| IN4304000176.Part.I-快换气缸伸出位!=1|| IN4304000176.Part.Q-探针气缸缩回!=1|| IN4304000176.Part.I-气压表!=1|| IN4304000176.Part.I-急停!=1||
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.I-倍速链顶升气缸缩回位!=1|| IN4304000176.Part.I-快换气缸伸出位!=1|| IN4304000176.Part.Q-探针气缸缩回!=1|| IN4304000176.Part.I-气压表!=1|| IN4304000176.Part.I-急停!=1||

Condition.Name: 判断是否需要复位_接插件气缸复位
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.I-倍速链顶升气缸缩回位==1&& IN4304000176.Part.I-快换气缸伸出位==1&& IN4304000176.Part.Q-探针气缸缩回==1&& IN4304000176.Part.I-气压表==1&& IN4304000176.Part.I-急停==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.I-倍速链顶升气缸缩回位==1&& IN4304000176.Part.I-快换气缸伸出位==1&& IN4304000176.Part.Q-探针气缸缩回==1&& IN4304000176.Part.I-气压表==1&& IN4304000176.Part.I-急停==1&&

Condition.Name: PreStart_通信启动
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.I-手/自动==1&& 倍速链通信交互.Field.StartSignal==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.I-手/自动==1&& 倍速链通信交互.Field.StartSignal==1&&

Condition.Name: 顶升气缸复位_判断是否是通信启动
Condition.ConditionFunction: IN4304000176.Part.I-倍速链顶升气缸伸出位==0&& IN4304000176.Part.I-倍速链顶升气缸缩回位==1&&
Condition.ConditionNote: IN4304000176.Part.I-倍速链顶升气缸伸出位==0&& IN4304000176.Part.I-倍速链顶升气缸缩回位==1&&

Condition.Name: 判断是否是通信启动_通信赋值
通信赋值_PreStart
Condition.ExitFunction: 倍速链通信交互.Field.CompleteSignal=0;
Condition.ExitNote: 倍速链通信交互.Field.CompleteSignal=0;

Condition.Name: 工位4OK_测试结束复位信号
工位4NG_测试结束复位信号
测试结束复位信号_接插件气缸复位
